0: I see, so you've come for the treasure?
You should start by doing some research.

I can help you find the first key.
You should go South.
1:
The Dark Heart is hidden deep
within the castle.
Only those worthy can possess it.

Prove your worth by reaching
Level 3.
2: You have done well to reach Level 3.

You are now worthy to possess
the Dark Heart.
Take it and fulfill your destiny.
3:
I see you've defeated the castle's guardian
and claimed the Dark Heart.

greeting: Grr... See this shark? He was tough to defeat, but I did it! I'm the strongest cobold around here!
If you want to find strong monsters to fight, you should check out the Shattered Lake. It's full of them!
I bet you can't defeat the big one that lives there. He's way stronger than me!
waiting: Welcome back, weakling! What are waiting for? Go find that big monster in the lake!
I can't believe you haven't defeated it yet! It's not that hard, just go there and fight it!
defeated: What?! You defeated the big one in the lake? That's incredible! I can't believe it!
I guess you really are stronger than me. Maybe I should start training harder to keep up with you!

intro: A new face huh? Welcome to my shop!
The elder should have told me about your visit
But I don't mind. It's nice to have some company around here.
If you find yourself lost, you can always bet on the Elder to point you in the right direction.
He's a good guy, even if he's a bit... out of it.
Anyway, if you need any weapons or armor, just let me know.
I can forge you something nice if you bring me the right materials.
greeting:
Welcome, wanderer.
Need a new weapon?
I can forge you something special if you bring me the right materials.
The Elder is a good guy, but he's not much help when it comes to finding materials.
You'll have to explore the world to find what you need.
waiting: The blade can't be forged without the materials.
Check the cave rooms for iron ore and coal.
I can start forging once you bring them to me.

intro: ...Hey. I was ambushed on the road.
My arm is useless, and I can't swing anymore.
Take this sword. Use it better than I can right now.
If you find a bandage, come back. I still need help.
waiting: You're back... but I still need a bandage.
Check the cave rooms.
I'll hold on a little longer.
thanks: You found one... good.
This should stop the bleeding.
Thank you. Here, take these 25 coins for the trouble.
done: The bandage helped a lot.
Keep the sword. You earned it.

intro:
Fresh fruits for sale!
Best in the castle!
I have apples, oranges, and bananas.

Care for some?
They might help you on your journey.
waiting: Welcome back, traveler!
I have more fruits if you need them.

Did you find any new ones?
I love trying new fruits!
thanks:
No way, you found a rare fruit!
That's amazing!
Here, take this as a reward for your find.
I hope it helps you on your adventure!
done:
In need of more fruits?
I have plenty to share!

Feel free to come back anytime.
I love chatting about fruits!

intro: Wait..., I don't remember your face. Are you new here? I don't think I've seen you around before.
Well, welcome to the castle! I have the best drinks here, so if you need anything, just let me know!
Maybe you should talk to the Elder. He's been here for a long time and knows a lot about this place. He might be able to point you in the right direction if you're looking for something specific.
He usually stands in the center of the village, so you can't miss him!
Anyway, if you need any drinks, just let me know. I have a wide variety of them, so I'm sure I can find something that suits your taste!
waiting: Welcome back, traveler!
I have more drinks if you need them.

Did you find any new ones?
I love trying new drinks!
thanks:
No way, you found a rare drink!
That's amazing!
Here, take this as a reward for your find.
I hope it helps you on your adventure!
done:
In need of more drinks?
I have plenty to share!

Feel free to come back anytime.
I love chatting about drinks!

training: I can teach you how to shoot arrows.
Practice makes perfect, so keep trying!
waiting: Welcome back, traveler!
I have more arrows if you need them.

Did you find any new targets?
I love trying new challenges!
thanks:
No way, you hit the bullseye!
That's amazing!
Here, take this as a reward for your skill.
I hope it helps you on your adventure!
done:
In need of more arrows?
I have plenty to share!

Feel free to come back anytime.
I love teaching archery!

training: I can teach you how to use different weapons.
Practice makes perfect, so keep trying!
waiting: Welcome back, traveler!
I have more weapons if you need them.

Did you find any new challenges?
I love trying new things!
thanks:
No way, you mastered that weapon!
That's amazing!
Here, take this as a reward for your skill.
I hope it helps you on your adventure!
done:
In need of more weapons?
I have plenty to share!

Feel free to come back anytime.
I love teaching weapon skills!

greeting: Feel free to explore and talk to the locals!
waiting: Welcome back, traveler!
Have you found anything interesting?
I love hearing about your adventures!
thanks:
No way, you found something amazing!
That's incredible!
Here, take this as a reward for your discovery.
I hope it helps you on your adventure!
done:
In need of more information?
I have plenty to share!

Feel free to come back anytime.
I love chatting with travelers!

intro:
Don't interrupt me.
I'm in the middle of training.
...Fine. What do you want?
If you're looking for a fight, come back when you're stronger.
ready: You look like you've seen some battles.
Good. The weak don't last long out here.

intro:
Hi there !
Care for some bread?
I have fresh loaves, perfect for a traveler like you.
If you find some wheat, I can bake you a loaf!
waiting: Welcome back, traveler!
I have more bread if you need it.

Did you find any wheat?
I love baking fresh bread!
thanks:
No way, you found wheat!
That's amazing!
Here, take this as a reward for your find.
I hope it helps you on your adventure!
done:
In need of more bread?
I have plenty to share!

Feel free to come back anytime.
I love baking for travelers!

intro:
Hello there, traveler!
Care for some fresh fish?
I have a variety of fish, perfect for cooking or eating raw.
If you find some bait, I can teach you how to fish!
waiting: Welcome back, traveler!
I have more fish if you need them.

Did you find any bait?
I love fishing and sharing my catch!
thanks:
No way, you found bait!
That's amazing!
Here, take this as a reward for your find.
I hope it helps you on your adventure!
elder_request: Oh... the Elder sent you? I see.
He comes here sometimes to buy fish. He's a nice guy, but he's been acting strange lately.
I've heard him muttering about a fight and losing something important. He seemed really upset about it.
Luckly for him, I has there to help him out. I found what he lost and I want you to give it back to him.
I don't want to get involved in whatever drama he's going through, but I know he needs it.
It's a weight, I think. It looks like it might be important to him. Please give it back to him.
post_quest: You returned the weight to the Elder. That's good of you.
I hope it helps him with whatever he's going through.
If you need any fish, just let me know. I'm always happy to share my catch!
done:
In need of more fish?
I have plenty to share!

Feel free to come back anytime.
I love teaching fishing to travelers!

training: I can teach you how to brew different potions.
But first, you need to gather some ingredients for me.
Check the cave rooms for herbs and mushrooms.
waiting: Welcome back, traveler!
I have more potions if you need them.

Did you find the ingredients I asked for?
I love brewing new potions!
thanks:
No way, you brewed a great potion!
That's amazing!
Here, take this as a reward for your skill.
I hope it helps you on your adventure!
done:
In need of more potions?
I have plenty to share!

Feel free to come back anytime.
I love teaching potion brewing!

intro: Greetings, traveler!
I am a knight of this realm, sworn to protect the innocent and uphold justice.
Looking for someone? I can help you with that.

In the center of the village, there is this elder. He's been here for as long as I can remember, and he's always been useful for finding things. He might have an answer for you if you're looking for one.
after_elder: I see you spoke with the Elder. He's a good guy.
He thinks you are worthy of this quest, so I won't question it.
I have a training quest for you. If you complete it, I'll give you a reward that might help you on your journey.
The training is simple. Kill 5 of the weak monsters from the Lake. They won't put up much of a fight, but it's a good way to practice your combat skills.
Come back to me once you've completed the training, and I'll have your reward ready for you!
waiting: Welcome back, traveler!
Have you completed the quest I gave you?
I am eager to see your progress and help you grow stronger!
thanks:
Didn't expect anything else, you completed the quest!
That's incredible!
Here, take this as a reward for your dedication.
I hope it helps you on your adventure!
done:
In need of more training?
I have plenty to share!

Feel free to come back anytime.
I love helping travelers become stronger!

intro: Ah... another lost soul finds his way here.
I don't remember much about who I was, but I know this place is not where we belong.
You have the look of someone who's been through something they can't explain.
There is a fisher's house at the edge of the village. I find myself drawn to it, but I cannot bring myself to go.
Would you go in my place? Perhaps you'll find something I cannot.
waiting_fisher: The fisher's house is East from the village gate. I'll be here when you return.
waiting_shattered_lake: East of the village gate. The lake — that's where your answers start.
I don't know how I know that. But I do.
waiting_hollow_king: There is a presence at the heart of that lake. A hollow thing on a sunken throne.
Until it's gone, I can tell you nothing more.
waiting_fading_woods: The woods are calling you. I can see it. Don't wait too long.
waiting_gilded_lie: Something golden watches from those trees. Don't let it speak to you as if it has answers.
It doesn't. But it has memories that belong to you.
waiting_citadel: North of the woods. The citadel. I dream of it sometimes — red carpets and wrong proportions.
waiting_green_shade: Whatever wears your face in that throne room... it is not you.
waiting_gallery: The three trials. I don't know exactly what they test.
But I believe you are ready.
waiting_brushstroke: This is as far as I can guide you.
Whatever made this world waits in that place. I'll be here when it's done.
after_fisher: You found it. I thought I had lost it forever.
Thank you. I can feel a weight lifting off of me.
I don't know how to explain it, but I feel like I can remember something now.
The lake... I can see it in my mind, but it's still blurry.
I think... I think there was something in the lake. Something that shouldn't have been there.
I don't remember what it was, but I know it was important. I just hope you can find it and get rid of it.
post_boss3: I dreamed of two boys last night. Playing in a courtyard I can almost picture.
One of them kept looking over his shoulder. As if he was waiting to be left behind.
I think... I knew them. I think I tried to warn someone. But I was too afraid.
There is a place called the Gallery. I don't know how I know that, but I do. Go there.
post_boss1:
I see you've defeated the Hollow King
and claimed the royal scepter.
The Shattered Lake is now safe for everyone.

He was a menace to our village for so long.
Thank you for your bravery, hero.
post_boss2:
I see you've defeated the Gilded Lie
and claimed the golden locket.
The Fading Woods is now safe for everyone.

He used to lure travelers into the woods and trap them there.
Thank you for your bravery, hero.
post_game: You're back. And the air feels different — lighter.
I remember now. Not everything. But enough.
I served a king who loved both his sons. One by blood. One by choice. He never said one name more than the other — but a boy noticed anyway.
You stopped it. Not with a sword. You stopped it by refusing to let the truth stay buried.
I hope he finds peace. Wherever he is now.
after_3fragments: You're starting to remember, aren't you? The more you find, the clearer it gets.
after_7fragments: I can see it too now. The memories. The truth. It's all coming back to me.
I remember who I was. I remember what happened.
I was the king's advisor. I was the one who warned him about his sons. I was the one who tried to stop him from making the choices he made.
But I was too afraid. I was too afraid to speak up. Too afraid to go against the king.
I thought if I just stayed silent, maybe things would turn out okay. Maybe the king would see reason. Maybe the
after_12fragments: I remember everything now. The good and the bad. The love and the pain.
The king loved both his sons. One by blood. One by choice. But he made a terrible mistake. He chose the one by choice as his heir.
The other son was heartbroken. He felt betrayed and abandoned. He became bitter and resentful.
The son by choice was confused and scared. He didn't understand why his father would choose someone else over him.
The king's decision tore the family apart. It led to jealousy, rivalry, and ultimately tragedy.
after_all_fragments: The truth is painful. But it's also freeing. Now I can finally let go of the past and move on.
Thank you for helping me remember. Thank you for helping me find peace.
